text: A location where a public highway or private road, including associated sidewalks, crosses one or more railroad tracks at grade.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 135-A — Railroad grade crossing

A location where a public highway or private road, including associated sidewalks, crosses one or more railroad tracks at grade.

*Last modified: Dec. 2, 2016*

subsections.text: A location where a public highway or private road, including associated sidewalks, crosses one or more railroad tracks at grade.
